_comment: Copy to your project root as stripe-smoke.json (gitignore-safe).

products._description: PDF info product. Landing → Stripe → Thanks → /download/file.pdf
Bundle. Thanks page should link to both a zip AND a pdf.

_notes: expected_status defaults to 200 for all steps. download_extensions is a list of file extensions to look for on the thanks page; the first match per extension is checked. If a product is video-based, use ['mp4'] or ['m4v'].
